Gregg Wallace visits the UKs largest sports shoe factory to see how 3,500 pairs of trainers are made every day, before meeting the man who comes up with the latest designs. The Mushlets love Mush-Mushs heroic stories. But when they demand to see him actually do something heroic, Mush-Mush feels he cant back out... and so ends up stuck up a cliff. Relieved to be rescued by Chep and Lilit, Mush-Mush is about to admit that he isnt a hero when the Mushlets find themselves in danger. Now Mush-Mush has no choice but to be a real hero!

Chanterelle has built a whistle that can reproduce the most beautiful sound of the forest: the one of the Nightingale. When the whistle disappears, Mush-Mush, Chep and Lilit soon discover that it has been stolen by a beetle. In order to finally hear what a real Nightingale sounds like, theyll have to get it back!

Wanting to rush off to climb Mush Mountain, Mush-Mush is in a hurry checking nectar level in flowers... a job that takes time and care. Soon Mush-Mushs haste causes disaster when he scares all the bees away. Now Mush-Mush and friends have to find a way to lure the bees back...

Mush-Mush is amazed by the way Mushpot uses his staff of wisdom and how awesome it makes him look. Mush-Mush wants to be as cool as Mushpot and asks him to lend him his staff of wisdom. But the staff comes with a lot of responsibilities...

When Mush-Mush and Chep lose Lilits flying disc down a snake tunnel, he is confident he can get it back. All animals love Chep and no-one knows more about snakes than he does. But this snake is not to be messed with! When they finally sneak into the snake tunnel, they learn why the snake has been acting so strangely...

All the Mushables have fun zooming down a long mudslide except Chep, who just cant get up the courage to do it. But when Fung and Miff tease him for being scared, he promises that he will do something that no Mushable has ever done before... ride a grasshopper! Chep is in for the ride of his life!

Grizzy discovers the leftovers of a Halloween party in the rangers cabin, which was entirely redecorated for the occasion, with stupefaction. But if the curious ambiance perturbs Grizzy, the Lemmings are in seventh heaven and have a whale of a time jumping up and down inside a cooking pot full of marshmallows. Grizzy wants to get rid of it until he accidentally swallows a marshmallow and discovers the best flavor of his life.

Grizzy wants to give the she-bear hes in love with a plastic ring which he finds really swell. But since the object was found in the trash, he needs to wash it first. And the Lemmings are using the sole bar of soap in the house as a bobsleigh.

Grizzy finds a strange American Indian figurine with the power to switch the spirits of two living beings and finds himself imprisoned in the body of a caribou. He immediately tries to activate the reverse procedure, but the Lemmings steal the figurine in order to turn into a partridge and fly away.

While salmon fishing on the riverbank, Grizzy hauls in an unusual catch: an old hand mirror straight out of a fairytale. Instead of showing the reflection of the person who holds it, the mirror shows an idealized vision of his surroundings. Whether it be Grizzy or the Lemmings, everyone sees the world of his dreams, and no one wants to share it.

In a casing that fell from a circus caravan, the Lemmings find a magic stick that can enchant objects and make them come alive. Grizzy is sure that a stick like that would save him a lot of work, the only problem is how to get it from the Lemmings, who have become sorcerers apprentices?
Whilst trying to stop the Lemmings from playing with a crate of firework rockets Grizzy is literally carried away with them when the largest specimen shoots off
Nutty Hill is suffering from a stifling heat wave. Grizzy decides to get into the fridge, where the temperature will be more bearable, but the shelves are already full of Lemmings.
Grizzy is frustrated: just as he was about to coat a nice big fresh salmon with chocolate spread and snuggle up in front of the TV he discovers that the pantry is empty!

Grizzy and the Lemmings lead a merciless battle over the house in an atmosphere of total madness, where the two adversaries constantly try to outdo each other with nasty tricks!
Chep wants to return a favour to Mush-Mush, but all Mush-Mush wants is to have a compost pancake on Pancake Day!

A motorcycle-riding robber known as the Dandy Highwayman is kidnapping all the women of Crystal Cove, and now its up to our heroes to put a stop to his rogue ways. When Daphne is taken, Fred loses it. Nobody steals his girl -- even if technically shes not actually his girl at the moment.

The gang and Mr. Bradshaw work together to get to the bottom of this space alien mystery and figure out what this alien is really after: championship rings or giant donuts.

De favoriete chef van Shaggy en Scooby opent eindelijk zijn eigen restaurant maar een monsterlijke yeti bedreigt de openingsavond. And this ghost is getting Sia in hot water by stealing countless gems and jewelry. Can our gang prove her innocence? Can they catch the true thief? Or will the ghostly doppelganger catch them instead?

They meet Whoopi Goldberg, whos been going to psychic school for a number of months now. Shes so close to graduating when a nightmare ghost attacks the school and seems to want to destroy all the students. Can our heroes see their future? Or is it all blank because they dont have one?
The gang goes to visit the Secret Six Puppies but soon discover a mysterious demon farmer haunts their farmhouse, which was built over an ancient graveyard, and wants the puppies gone.
The ghost of a Russian hockey player shows up to ruin an international tournament in Moscow. Cartoon capers with the mystery-solving canine and his friends.

When the ghost of a small towns founder returns to scare off mayoral candidates, the gang decides to run Velma as mayor to bait the ghost. They quickly discover, however, that Velma lacks the skillset to make her a popular politician!

A very bad parking choice on Freds part leads the gang to an asteroid mining base in outer space where an alien virus appears to be infecting the crew one by one, turning them into evil skull-headed aliens. The paranoid, terrified gang must try to solve the mystery before the virus reaches them, as well – if it hasnt already!
Fred, Daphne, Velma, Shaggy and Scooby-Doo join forces with some of the biggest names in celebrity and pop culture.
Scooby Doo and our gang of mystery solvers travel up a lost river in the Amazon Rainforest with famous comedian and actor Jason Sudeikis in search of a great treasure...
The gang investigate claims that the ghost of a magician is haunting the concert hall where their friend is playing.
Roller Ghoster Ride!: The gang visit an amusement park that is haunted by the Roller Ghoster, a speed-happy spectre that frightens customers away from the fast rides.

Fred wisselt van plek met Jeff, de tourgids in het geschiedenismuseum, zodat hij de gang kan helpen een mysterie op te lossen. Het mysterie: een angstaanjagende Egyptische krokodilgod terroriseert het museum. Het probleem: Fred is onmiddellijk jaloers op de nieuwe vent en wil het mysterie oplossen voordat Jeff de kans krijgt, met de hulp van de kinderen uit de tourgroep van Jeff.
Catch the best Fred episodes in these thrilling adventures. From mystery-solving to ghost-hunting, theres no quest too tricky for the gang!
Scooby and our gang of mystery solving teens have been invited by famous comedian Jeff Foxworthy to help him move an old mansion that hes just purchased.
When the gang investigates the history of Crystal Cove the mummy of a Franciscan Friar comes to life... to finish what it started.
Join Scooby and the gang as they embark on epic mysteries, featuring some of the creepiest beasts around!
Shaggy and Scooby are camp counselors when a ghost story comes to life!
Hitting the ski slopes in the beautiful Rocky Mountains of Colorado Scooby Doo and the gang run into none other than American Gold Medallist and famous snowboar

The gang enters the heart of the American Gothic South in order to help an attractive farmer who Fred wants to impress with his mystery-solving prowess. A horrifying Scarecrow has come to life and attempts to drive everyone off his farm.
The gang is hired by Daphnes uncle, a famous director, as extras in his latest project. But the star of the show is a real, nasty ape.
Crystal Cove may be the most haunted town in the world, but that doesnt stop Scooby and the gang from trying to prove that most of its most famous tourist attractions were fakes.

The Lemmings throw a surprise birthday party for one of the clan. When "Happy Birthday" rings out, the surpriiiiiise! is as great for Grizzy, who is trying to take a nap after a hearty meal, as it is for the birthday Lemming hero in question. From that point on, Grizzy has only one objective: stop the din, which is not at all helping his migraine headache. But for the Lemmings, the party must go on at any price.

A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzys adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzy sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back. But the Lemmings, who are riding on the back of a bucking caribou, realize that the flower makes their mount sneeze, which only makes the game ten times more fun!

Grizzy finds two identical vases in a Native American chest. They are communicating vessels, so if he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them. This should satisfy Grizzys natural lazy streak, unless the Lemmings realise the incredible games they could play with the magic vases.

Mush-Mush cant figure out why his sense foot keeps buzzing like crazy... until an earthquake shakes the forest. Mush-Mush is sure he predicted it! Convinced he can now predict the future, Mush-Mush starts making predictions for everyone in Mushton...
Everyone in Mushton is finding that their precious wooden things are being munched and destroyed by someone or something.
Everyone in Mushton is finding that their precious wooden things are being munched and destroyed by someone or something.

If Mush-Mush had Bolly’s speed, he’d want everyone to see just how awesomely fast he was. But Bolly is different – he just likes to use his speed helping Mushables. So when Mush-Mush organizes a big stunt for Bolly, he refuses. He just doesn’t like to show off. But Mush-Mush promised everyone a show so a show he will give them – with Mush-Mush performing instead of Bolly! Gulp!
Chep becomes obsessed with learning all about Mushlore – all the funny little traditions and things that Mushables believe in.

Starmushs back is stuck, and the Mushelder has no choice but to ask for help in Mushton. Because Chep is the one that finds a solution to his back problem, Starmush chooses him to help with his daily activities. But Mush-Mush is jealous, he would have loved being the chosen one...

Puff doesnt like change much. And with spring about to burst forth and all the changes spring brings, he is puffing out nervous fog which is blanketing the whole of Mushton. Mush-Mush and friends need to get Puff to relax and celebrate spring together with all the other Mushables!

So Mushpie can take a break, Mush-Mush, Chep and Lilit offer to look after the Mushies, assuring her that everything will be fine. But a Mushie pops to become a Mushlet and escapes. Our friends find him in Muddlers clutches! Now, they must figure out a way to save the Mushlet and return the other Mushies to their cave before the return of Mushpie.

The Mushlets love Mush-Mushs heroic stories. But when they demand to see him actually do something heroic, Mush-Mush feels he cant back out... and so ends up stuck up a cliff. Relieved to be rescued by Chep and Lilit, Mush-Mush is about to admit that he isnt a hero when the Mushlets find themselves in danger. Now Mush-Mush has no choice but to be a real hero!

Chanterelle has built a whistle that can reproduce the most beautiful sound of the forest: the one of the Nightingale. When the whistle disappears, Mush-Mush, Chep and Lilit soon discover that it has been stolen by a beetle. In order to finally hear what a real Nightingale sounds like, theyll have to get it back!

Mush-Mush is amazed by the way Mushpot uses his staff of wisdom and how awesome it makes him look. Mush-Mush wants to be as cool as Mushpot and asks him to lend him his staff of wisdom. But the staff comes with a lot of responsibilities...

When Mush-Mush and Chep lose Lilits flying disc down a snake tunnel, he is confident he can get it back. All animals love Chep and no-one knows more about snakes than he does. But this snake is not to be messed with! When they finally sneak into the snake tunnel, they learn why the snake has been acting so strangely...

All the Mushables have fun zooming down a long mudslide except Chep, who just cant get up the courage to do it. But when Fung and Miff tease him for being scared, he promises that he will do something that no Mushable has ever done before... ride a grasshopper! Chep is in for the ride of his life!

When Lilit creates a "friends tree" mapping out who everyone is best friends with in Mushton, she realizes Muddler has no friends at all. Unable to accept this, Lilit slips away to try and befriend him. But Muddlers perception of friendship is somewhat unique, meaning Lilit now needs the help of her two best friends, Mush-Mush and Chep, to escape from Muddlers clutches.

Chep is so good at moss-marbles, no one wants to play him anymore! No one except Sumush who reveals himself to be a tough competitor. To Chep’s disbelief, Sumush keeps on winning. But Lilit and Mush-Mush convince their friend not to give up. Chep decides to play his favourite moss-marble: the Rollinator. The one marble he never risked playing before...

Grizzy discovers that the frenzied "break dance" the Lemmings are doing is actually due to the fleas they are infested with. When Grizzy catches them too, its panic all round! Grizzy is determined to eliminate the parasites, down to the very last one. The problem is his little roommates have no desire whatsoever to be treated...

Another heat wave: even the riverbed is dried up. One very thirsty Grizzy discovers that the Lemmings have used the last remaining bottles of water to fill their inflatable pool. He has no intention of letting the Lemmings swim in what might very well be his last chance to quench his thirst.
The Lemmings have caught a little spider. Her sticky threads are perfect for bungee jumping. Grizzy, who has no intention of getting caught in the web, decides to crush the insect.
Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over chocolate-spread jar lids, which they use as chips to win goodies. But more importantly, theres s grand prize: a giant jar of Yummy.

Grizzy has prepared himself a TV dinner to eat in front of his favorite series. But his moment of pleasure is abruptly interrupted by unexplained static. Grizzy rapidly discovers that the true "interference" is the Lemmings, who are using the TV antenna as a diving board for their water games.

The Lemmings are having a rave party. When Grizzy throws their ghetto blaster into the river, he sparks a general power outage. Unless he finds an alternative source of energy, and before the Lemmings do, he can kiss his TV night goodbye!
Grizzy decides to give she-bear the flowers that decorate the window ledges of the rangers cabin. Can he bring them to her without the Lemmings ruining them?
This is not Grizzys day: after making a fool of himself in front of the she-bear he is ousted from the cabin by the Lemmings. But his luck is about to change.

Grizzy can¿t believe his eyes when he sees objects moving all by themselves. When he realizes it¿s the Lemmings who are playing around with a particularly powerful magnet, he has a stroke of genius. He will design a telekinesis trick to impress his beloved she-bear.

Because Mush-Mush, Chep and Lilit are always up to new adventures, Bolly has dubbed them The Adventurers. Flattered, our friends invite Bolly to choose his challenge to become an Adventurer too. Bolly will have to be the first Mushable to set foot somewhere. Mushton being crowded, Mush-Mush suggests they find an island, somewhere on the giant lake…

Truff is happy. He has found a necklace that makes him even Truffier! Except he had no idea the necklace belongs to Starmush. And the Mushelder promised there will be consequences for whoever took it. Mush-Mush, Chep and Lilit now have to save Truff from being consequenced...
Chep has been watching Sushi-Mushi test new compost fritters recipes. When Mush-Mush gets to taste one, he can’t believe it: Sushi-Mushi has cooked the perfect fritter.

Chep knows so many things about nature that Mush-Mush and Lilit are confident he’s not far from being an expert like Mushpot. So, when Travel Snail seems unwell, Mush-Mush and Lilit encourage their friend to take care of her in Mushpot’s absence. Chep’s diagnosis takes everyone by surprise: Travel Snail is expecting baby snails! At least that’s what Chep is convinced about…
Fung and Miff have come across a rare piece of bark struck by lightning.
When Chep asks Mush-Mush and Lilit to go storm-watching and they refuse, Lilit feels bad and convinces Mush-Mush to join their friend.
When an egg rolls into Moletown and a duckling hatches, Moley must play momma to the baby duck until they can find its home.
When Moley helps take care of the worms at Dotty’s Adopt a Worm Rescue Center, the Gardener sends Squirm to pose as a homeless worm and help him steal Manny.
When Moley’s Keeper duties are pulling him in too many directions, he gets Manny to create multiple Moleys!
When Dotty joins an art competition Moley is afraid her art won’t appeal to the snooty judge so he casts a spell that causes her art to "come to life!"

But, Billy Dee has extra cool to spare, and he and the gang work together to get to the bottom of this kooky mystery before its too late.

Carmen nel frattempo e molto impegnata con la cerimonia che sta organizzando per presentare la candidatura di Francisco come presidente del circolo Imprenditori. Carmen e convinta che Patricia stia tramando qualcosa e limprovviso appoggio della donna alla candidatura di Francisco non la convince, Patricia tenta di dimostrarle che si sta sbagliando. Ma non ce tempo per le lamentele personali: gli agenti devono occuparsi di una ragazza ferita da un anonimo che le ha sparato da lontano. Potrebbe trattarsi di un tiratore scelto.. Intanto Ugo e Vittoria risolvono il caso di una professoressa vittima di telefonate anonime oscene. Intanto, fra Ingargiola e Vittoria accade qualcosa che non si sarebbero mai aspettati.

Il conflitto tra Li e Poppy si inasprisce. Li accusa Poppy di essere una cacciatrice di dote e una cattiva madre. Critica il suo stile di vita e laccusa di usare sostanze stupefacenti come le sue "mentine speciali". Li teme che Poppy non stia dando un buon esempio a Luna e che le sue abitudini possano portare la figlia sulla strada della droga. Poppy si difende, sostenendo di essere una donna adulta e che le sue scelte non danneggiano ne se stessa ne sua figlia. Accusa Li di giudicarla costantemente e di imporre standard rigidi a tutti. Luna (Lisa Yamada) torna a casa dalla madre sconvolta dopo essersi svegliata nel letto di Zende (Delon De Metz), dopo aver fatto lamore con lui convinta di essere insieme a R.J. (Joshua Hoffman), il suo fidanzato. Quindi confessa a Poppy (Romy Parks) di non ricordare chiaramente che cosa sia successo e di sentirsi molto confusa e di provare dei sensi di colpa, poiche ama con tutto il cuore R.J. e non lo tradirebbe mai volontariamente.

I sentimenti tra Alihan e Zeynep, nonostante il matrimonio di lui con Ender, restano forti e contrastanti. Durante una cena, la tensione esplode: Ender li affronta pubblicamente, portando a una situazione carica di imbarazzo. Il matrimonio tra Ender e Alihan e solo di facciata, ma Ender pretende di mantenere le apparenze e minaccia Alihan quando lo scopre con Zeynep. Tuttavia, Alihan non ha intenzione di rinunciare a lei e mette Ender di fronte a una dura realta: non si pieghera alle sue regole.
Il dating show che racconta lamore in chiave contemporanea, tra tronisti giovani e partecipanti over che cercano la loro anima gemella.

Enver e le altre donne raccontano a Bahar tutto quello che e successo e il motivo per cui le hanno tenuto nascosto del ritorno di Sarp, sperando che lei potesse perdonarli, ma Bahar, profondamente delusa, dice loro di non volerli piu vedere. Intanto, Sarp chiede aiuto a Munir per proteggere Bahar e i bambini dagli uomini di Nezir che li stanno sorvegliando, poi confessa a Piril che Sirin lo tiene in pugno perche e in possesso di foto compromettenti. Ceyda ha un colloquio con Jale e la donna le offre una possibilita come baby-sitter di Bora. Sirin mette, per dispetto, i piatti sporchi nello spazio in cucina dove prima cera la lavastoviglie, mandando Enver su tutte le furie. Infine, Arif ha uno scontro con Yusuf perche ha venduto lanello di sua madre che aveva regalato a Bahar.

Dopo una conversazione piena di intenzioni, Julia e Tirso decidono di iniziare una nuova tappa della loro vita, e non saranno gli unici ad avere quellobiettivo a Robledillo. Diana, nonostante la paura, da una possibilita alla sua relazione virtuale con Antonio sotto consiglio della figlia. Mario si apre con Erik, raccontandogli di un periodo molto doloroso della sua storia familiare. Intanto, Dani e Chloe hanno fatto pace, ma lui non ha ancora confessato di essere lo stesso "Dani" di cui Chloe si e innamorata. Dani ha intenzione di parlare con Ribero prima della sua partenza per Berlino. Erik confessa che ha ripreso ad avere un bel rapporto con sua madre. A Rio Muni, una Carmen confusa vuole credere che Victor sia libero da qualsiasi colpa per il fallimento della candidatura di Francisco. Nonostante Victor si mostri sincero e chieda solo fiducia, Carmen non puo dimenticare che e figlio di don Ventura.

Julia si confessa con Elena e ammette di non capire bene il comportamento di Tirso: dice di provare un sentimento molto forte per lei, ma non ha avuto problemi a riprendere la sua relazione con Olga. Diana e combattuta perche non e sicura di voler incontrare Antonio, luomo che ha conosciuto on-line. Ha paura di esporsi al fallimento, ma accettare di avere un appuntamento con lui le da anche a una speranza di felicita. Erik sorprende Tirso e Olga insieme, chiedendo loro perdono e accettando, a modo suo, il loro rapporto damore. I due sono felicissimi di questo cambiamento nellatteggiamento del ragazzo. Leo cerco di parlare con Julia, ma Diana cerca di impedirglielo. A Rio Muni, Carmen e pronta a lottare e vuole che suo padre don Francisco non ceda allinfluenza di Patricia e che mantenga la sua candidatura alla presidenza del Circolo Imprenditori nonostante gli ostacoli. Angel e Ines scoprono finalmente dove si trova il tenente Ibanez.

Julia riceve la visita di Leo, intenzionato a guadagnarsi il suo perdono dopo essere riuscito a far ritirare gli articoli dal giornale. Leo promette che non ci saranno piu articoli su di lei: ha restituito tutti i soldi guadagnati con quegli articoli e devoluto i proventi delle pubblicita sul sito a Sebas. Tuttavia Julia, ancora ferita per essere stata ingannata, non si sente ancora pronta ad accettare le sue scuse. Intanto Tirso fa visita a suo fratello in carcere per metterlo al corrente della sua relazione con Olga, ma la sua reazione e cosi inaspettata che lalbergatore ha paura di dire la verita a Erik. A Rio Muni, Carmen riflette sulla risposta da dare a Victor riguardo i suoi sentimenti, finche il ragazzo la sorprende con una proposta allettante. Questa proposta inaspettata le fara riconsiderare il suo futuro in Guinea, con grande tristezza di Kiros. Intanto, Ines e Angel continuano a collaborare per scoprire tutta la verita sullomicidio di Alicia.

Mauro e Roberto corrono a fermare un uomo che sta platealmente per spararsi in strada. Giulia continua, nel frattempo, ad indagare sulla morte di Paolo, sulla base di alcune foto fatte esaminare dalla scientifica.

R.J. si confida con sua madre Brooke (Katherine Kelly Lang), preoccupato per latteggiamento insolito di Luna, ma completamente ignaro di quello che e realmente accaduto. Zende, anchegli piuttosto turbato, rievoca quello che e accaduto e cerca conforto e sostegno nel nonno Eric (John McCook) che e passato a trovarlo e che tra le altre cose gli parla proprio di Luna chiedendogli di farle da mentore nel lungo periodo in cui lui sara assente per la convalescenza. Intanto a casa Nozawa la verita emerge gradualmente: Luna ricorda di essersi sentita stranamente stanca alla festa e di essere entrata in una delle dependance per prendere dellacqua, e poi di essersi addormentata. Rievoca pero unimmagine vivida di R.J., nonostante fosse in realta con Zende.

Yildiz, ormai esasperata dalla sua vita con Halit, prende una decisione drastica: fa le valigie e se ne va via di casa. Si dirige da Kemal, determinata a confessargli i suoi sentimenti, ma con sua grande sorpresa scopre che in quel momento e in corso il matrimonio tra Kemal e Zehra. Proprio mentre gli sposi stanno per pronunciare il fatidico "si", la cerimonia viene bruscamente interrotta da una telefonata: Erim ha avuto un incidente e ha investito una donna, che sembra essere morta. Il panico si diffonde rapidamente tra i membri della famiglia.

Enver e le altre donne raccontano a Bahar tutto quello che e successo e il motivo per cui le hanno tenuto nascosto del ritorno di Sarp, sperando che lei potesse perdonarli, ma Bahar, profondamente delusa, dice loro di non volerli piu vedere. Intanto, Sarp chiede aiuto a Munir per proteggere Bahar e i bambini dagli uomini di Nezir che li stanno sorvegliando, poi confessa a Piril che Sirin lo tiene in pugno perche e in possesso di foto compromettenti. Ceyda ha un colloquio con Jale e la donna le offre una possibilita come baby-sitter di Bora. Sirin mette, per dispetto, i piatti sporchi nello spazio in cucina dove prima cera la lavastoviglie, mandando Enver su tutte le furie. Infine, Arif ha uno scontro con Yusuf perche ha venduto lanello di sua madre che aveva regalato a Bahar.

In order to get high school credits, Rigby has to pass a foreign language class taught by Benson in China.
Flame King breaks out of his prison and takes over the Flame Kingdom again.

programmes.d: While shopping at the mall, the Titans enter a contest to win a hot tub.

programmes.t: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programmes.d: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Nicole strikes up a friendship with a sympathetic AI. As their relationship intensifies, the AI tries to drive a wedge between Nicole and the other Wattersons.

Nick and Mike try to uncover the true identity of a Reader who is using his Hero Book powers to take revenge on bullies at their high school. / Scattered superheroes are revealed in San Francisco. Dirk O follows Krista, meeting a formidable man. / Mike and Nick, while chasing a pickpocket, run into X, leading to a battle over the Hero Books. / Mike enjoys working on homework with Lucy, but their date turns chaotic when Sylph appears.

Darwin is delighted when they discover their old childhood toys, but soon realises that some things are best left in the past. / When Gumball and Darwin see a mysterious lady leaving their house, they follow her to find out who she is. / Gumball spends all day with Bomb Kid who discovers that he may well be unprankable. / Gumball and Darwin discover that their teacher, Mr Corneille, has a secret life as a fighter.

The Wattersons look back on Anais first days in the Watterson house. Gumball and Darwin quickly find themselves up an opponent who is able to outsmart them at every turn. / Gumball is surprised by how upset he is when Tobias makes fun of him, tries to figure out why he feels Tobias doesnt have the right. / Gumball and Darwin have decided to do nothing for a whole day, but sometimes its much harder to do nothing than something. / The kids try to help Dad bond with Frankie.

Gumball seeks justice when Banana Joe chews Darwins pen. / Gumball is determined to drive Penny away from Leslie / Darwin develops a texting addiction when he and Gumball get their first cell phone. / Richard gets a job as a pizza delivery man which worries Nicole when at the same time strange things begin to occur around the neighbourhood. / Carrie takes Gumball Darwin and Anais to a real haunted house party on Halloween. / Gumball Darwin and Anais search for the Watterson family treasure. / For once in his life Gumball is the one whos owed an apology. / Darwin is too polite to speak his mind so Gumball teaches him to be direct.

Granny JoJos overprotective behavior puts the Wattersons in danger. / Gumball thinks Teri is way too scared of germs. / Gumball destroys Alan and Carmens relationship and has to reunite them. / Gumball and Darwin rent a film called A Ponys Tail to watch with Anais but keep getting distracted on their way home. / Gumball and Darwin try to get a game back from Tobias but Darwin starts to feel like a sidekick to Gumball and refuses to follow his orders. / Darwin kisses Penny in one of Gumballs dreams and gets mad. / Richard overhears Gumball and Darwin making fun of him which hurts his feelings and he has to regain his reputation as a hero. / Gumball tries to look good in the school photo. / Gumball and Darwin cheat on their maths test get detention and have to escape.

Gumball and Darwin get caught in the middle of a trash can war between Richard and Mr. Robinson. / Nicole gets upset with the family at the supermarket when her kids want chocolate but she says no. / The Wattersons must survive a bizarre game of Dodj or Daar through to the end.

programmes.t: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programmes.d: Bert enters a prestigious Squire-Off tournament, in order to prove himself worthy of being Prince Ivandoe’s squire. / An arrogant little frogman needs the help of Prince Ivandoe to lift his curse and become the big, beautiful bullfrog he once was. / Prince Ivandoe triumphantly finds the One True Acorn, during a rigged royal contest. / When Prince Ivandoe saves the life of a Wishapillar, he is granted a wish. / When Prince Ivandoe gets a case of the “Birthday Bluesies”, Bert is determined to throw him a Stag Kingdom party with all of his favourite treats.

Gumball destroys Alan and Carmens relationship and has to reunite them. / Gumball and Darwin rent a film called A Ponys Tail to watch with Anais but keep getting distracted on their way home. / Gumball and Darwin try to get a game back from Tobias but Darwin starts to feel like a sidekick to Gumball and refuses to follow his orders. / Darwin kisses Penny in one of Gumballs dreams and gets mad.

Gumball tries to look good in the school photo. / Richard overhears Gumball and Darwin making fun of him which hurts his feelings and he has to regain his reputation as a hero.

To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear who came to visit. / Masha enthusiastically plays with her dolls but Rosie wants to be independent. She trades places with wolves and now they are under Mashas care. / Do you think its hard to get a star from the sky? Nothing is impossible for our heroes! / Hockey is a game for the most courageous strong and dexterous! All you need is a united experienced team and a talented coach who can lead them to victory. / An old friend comes to visit the Bear. He brings along an amazing game - billiards. Isnt it an excuse to have fun and compete? / Summer is a time of rest and miracles. How nice is just to sit on the river bank with your best friends! However everything is not so simple in our story. / No child likes to live by the rules: clean up after themselves learn do homework in time... Its much more interesting to go on a fun adventure with new friends.

The residents of Pontypandy wake up to find the whole of the town flooded! Fireman Sam and Tom Thomas the helicopter pilot lend a hand where they can. / It is open day at Pontypandy Fire Station and everyone is invited to visit and have a look around. Norman and James end up stuck on the roof when they want to see more. / Mike has built a rocket and is preparing to launch it. Norman has become fascinated by Mikes project and wants to build and launch one of his own. / When Sarah and James discover that the Wholefish Cafe is about to have its one millionth customer they convince Bronwyn that there should be a big celebration to mark the event. / When the Pontypandy Pioneers go to the fire station to complete their fire safety badge Norman wants to prove to his cousin Derek that he can drive a fire engine.

Grizzy discovers the leftovers of a Halloween party in the rangers cabin which was entirely redecorated for the occasion. / Grizzy wants to give the she-bear hes in love with a plastic ring which he finds really swell. / Grizzy finds a strange figurine with the power to switch the spirits of two living beings and finds himself imprisoned in the body of a caribou. / While salmon fishing on the riverbank Grizzy hauls in an unusual catch: an old hand mirror straight out of a fairytale. / In a casing that fell from a circus caravan the Lemmings find a magic stick that can enchant objects and make them come alive. / Grizzy stops the Lemmings from playing with fireworks. / With their endless battles over the rangers cabin which they do not want to share Grizzy and the Lemmings end up blowing the cabin up. / The Lemmings encounter a white bear which has drifted all the way to them on a chunk of ice which is slowly melting.

Barnaby is in the mood for hugs, but not all his friends are. / Declan accidentally upsets Gus by not properly explaining the rules of a game. / Lu feels discouraged when her xylophone playing doesnt get the reaction shed hoped for. / Lu gets frustrated when Gus wont join in her mimicking game. / Lu is a good friend to Barnaby when he regrets not showing the class his backwards roly poly. / Lu gets upset when she loses Declans special toy. / Lu fails to realise that Biba is scared by a game they are playing together.
Rain, Rain, Go Away and Other Melodies / Cocomelon Winter Melodies / - / -

When Sam is cast as the main lead in Mrs Chens play, Elvis decides to give him some tips on acting. / Norman is making the “best spy movie ever” about an international spy but unfortunately poor James has been roped in as his stunt double. / When Hannah uses her dad’s JoeJet2000 to propel their hot air balloon, she loses control and needs the Ocean Rescue team to get them back to safety! / As Sam Ellie and Arnold put Bessie in the shed to protect her from the winter chill they come across Gareth wearing a cardboard astronaut’s helmet. / Hannah, James and Sarah launch a sandwich into space and a surprise rescue mission when their space images capture a flare in the mountains!

Mr Bean drives Mrs Wicket to the hospital for a minor operation, but gets bored waiting and goes for a wander… / Mr Bean is determined to have a go on a kids’ fire engine ride in a supermarket. / Mr Bean destroys a flower delivery for Mrs Wicket so goes on a mission to replace it, one flower at a time! / Mr Bean uses Mr Paliwal’s new drone to help find his stolen car.

Mr Bean wants a smart phone but they’re too expensive especially when you can build your own! / Mr Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel! / Mr Bean goes in search of wildlife but he isn’t expecting to see anything prehistoric! / Mr Bean has to look after an injured Mrs Wicket whose demands start to become a pain.

Mr Bean is driven to distraction by diabolical decibels. / Mr Bean finds himself with more than a spring in his step. / A puzzling puzzle has Mr Bean truly puzzled. / Mr Bean needs to let a room but no one will let him.

Mr. Bean tries to learn skateboarding but hurts himself. / Mrs. Wicket becomes annoyingly inconsolable when Scrapper goes missing – calling for him at all hours of the day and night. Bean can’t get any sleep! / Bean discovers Mrs. Wicket’s nephew and Bruiser Jnr swapping football stickers and decides that he wants to fill up a sticker album too. / Mr. Bean thinks he’s just dug up a valuable coin in the back-garden and goes rushing off to the Museum to have it valued.

Redbird learns a lesson in asking for permission when he takes one of Buffs stuffed animals without asking. / When Bam is covered in super bouncy Bounce X goo during a chase with Prank, he must learn to use his newfound bouncing abilities to his advantage. / Bam must learn to adapt and try something new as he’s tasked to dive the Bat Big Rig all the way to Star City, while the Legion of Zoom chases after him. / Batwing and Goldie secretly decide to participate in the Gotham Air-Show.

Summer is a time of rest and miracles. How nice is just to sit on the river bank with your best friends! However everything is not so simple in our story. / Tired from Mashas endless games the Bear pretends to be sick so she will leave him alone. But the caring girl is determined to cure her friend. / Masha dreams of royal life. Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? / The Bear goes fishing. However it is not long before Masha appears and transforms a pleasant fishing trip into a nightmare. Eventually Masha ends up catching a magic goldfish. / While inspecting his garden the Bear notices that his tulips are not doing well. The Bear is fed and decides to make the ultimate growing potion. / Spring has dawned, the birds have arrived! But a pigeon settles in the birdhouse near Bear’s house, and Masha, obviously, is more than happy to lure him and caress him.

The bream has gone missing from the fish counter at the Wholefish Cafe, and Detective James is determined to crack The Case of the Missing Fish. / When Tom Thomas’s obsession with a birdwatching app causes him to tumble off a cliff, it’s up to a new helicopter pilot to save the day! / Mrs Chens class make sky lanterns for Chinese New Year but until Norman Price creates a disaster when he lets go of his too early. / On a wildlife sketching trip, Norman wants to find the most spectacular creature to sketch, but this gets a bit tricky when Lily Chen tags along. / Norman Price practices his new career as a shepherd by rounding up Woolly with Radar. However Woolly and her lamb run into the road and make Mike Floods van tip over.

The Lemmings learn that Tabasco can propel them high. / The Lemmings have decided to organize a race with two sand yachts they found on the beach. The only thing missing, is a worthy adversary. / Grizzy has run out of ideas to open his coconut until he sees the Lemmings new friend the crab open one with a simple snip of the claw. / A helicopter takes off from the beach, leaving behind installations for a TV game, namely lots of food supplies – which are locked up. / While trying to avoid the Lemmings outboard speedboat, Grizzy punctures his air mattress and is propelled into a hidden grotto. / Yummy, Grizzy and the Lemmings find a polar bear cub crying. / A meteorite falls not far from the cabin.

programmes.t: Save the Garden / Red Light Stop, Green Light Go / Practice Makes Purple
programmes.d: To help save the community garden, Barney shows the kids that small things can affect big change! / When Mel pushes her body too far without rest, Barney and Billy help her learn to listen to what her body is feeling. / Vivie gets frustrated that shes not immediately good at soccer so Barney shows her how practice can help make her better. / After a disagreement among the kids about what to do with a ripe tomato, Vivie learns the importance of sharing.

Mr Bean tricks Irma into a photoshoot just so he can submit a picture for a competition prize. / Mr Bean buys a new Big Ted – but how will he get on with Teddy? / Mr Bean takes Billy to a climbing centre and gets drawn into a challenge. / Mr Bean loses a stranger’s engagement ring and has to get it back in time for the proposal!

Mr Bean wants a smart phone but they’re too expensive especially when you can build your own! / Mr Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel! / Mr Bean goes in search of wildlife but he isn’t expecting to see anything prehistoric! / Mr Bean has to look after an injured Mrs Wicket whose demands start to become a pain.

Mr Bean is driven to distraction by diabolical decibels. / Mr Bean finds himself with more than a spring in his step. / A puzzling puzzle has Mr Bean truly puzzled. / Mr Bean needs to let a room but no one will let him.

Mr. Bean tries to learn skateboarding but hurts himself. / Mrs. Wicket becomes annoyingly inconsolable when Scrapper goes missing – calling for him at all hours of the day and night. Bean can’t get any sleep! / Bean discovers Mrs. Wicket’s nephew and Bruiser Jnr swapping football stickers and decides that he wants to fill up a sticker album too. / Mr. Bean thinks he’s just dug up a valuable coin in the back-garden and goes rushing off to the Museum to have it valued.

Woolly is sent to stay with Norman who is ill whilst Mike mends her fields gate. Unfortunately Norman and Woolly go out resulting in Trevors bus swerving off the road. / A heatwave hits Pontypandy and the fire crew are relaxing and trying to keep cool. Chief Fire Officer Boyce has other ideas as he puts his rigorous fitness routine into action. / Sarah is excited to shadow Sergeant Rose Ravani… until she’s stuck filing maps. But when Gareth gets lost, Sarah learns how important sergeants are. / Bronwyn takes Sarah and Nipper the dog out on a walk along the cliffs to tire out Nipper but trouble strikes when Sarah falls on a rock and hurts her leg. / James hopes his dad’s massive binoculars will help spot a rare seal, but they cause him to topple overboard, instead!

Lu refuses a snack that turns out to be yummier than shed imagined. / Lu tries to cheer Declan up, but he doesnt want to be cheered up. / Lu and Barnaby have a disagreement during Art Time at Shell School. / Lus upset when no-one seems to like her new shoes. / Lu feels sad when her flowery friend begins to droop. / Lu struggles to understand Elodies upset when she accidentally spoils her game.

The best remedy for boredom is a good game. And a good play is even better. That is exactly what our friends decided. Its just not so easy to agree on what kind of play to stage.. / Who to be when you grow up? Finding the answer to this question is one of the most difficult processes for each child. Masha is no exception. / Everyone has their own favorite food. Our friends are ready to enjoy something delicious in the new episode. Can a treat be tasty and healthy at the same time? / When we crave for adventures and new experiences, we take sleeping bags and a tent and go camping. We will admire amazing landscapes, climb a mountain and even see real volcanoes! / What is inside such seemingly simple objects surrounding us? How are the mechanisms that we use every day arranged? Maybe they work with the help of magic? / Do you know what ornithology is? This is a science that studies birds! And it is also Dashas new hobby. She comes to visit Masha and the Bear and discovers a new unique bird!

Station Officer Steele hurts his back and Chief Fire Officer Boyce fills in his role for the day. / Pontypandy is holding a Charity Concert and Elvis is to be the star act. / Mandy wants to be a round-the-world yachtswoman but when her mast breaks she finds herself stranded at sea. / Sarah and James have got a pet guinea pig and name him Norris Station Officer Steeles real name but then the guinea pigs taste for cables soon leads to a fire. / Huge footprints in the snow convince Sarah that theres a polar bear in the area. She tries to photograph it for a local newspaper competition.

Grizzy gets rid of the Lemmings by crushing them. / The Lemmings discover a strange pond in an American Indian grotto that has the power to rejuvenate anyone who dips in it. / Before taking a nap Grizzy locks the food in a cupboard to prevent the Lemmings from getting into it. / When Grizzy and the Lemmings accidentally activate a magic disk representing the earth they are sent back in time to the prehistoric era. / Grizzy finds a bottle containing a love potion anyone who drinks it immediately falls in love with the first creature he sees. / The Lemmings notice that Grizzy moves away from the jar of chocolate spread whenever he chases the fly buzzing around him. / Grizzy discovers the rangers collection of bird calls by chance. / Grizzy and the Lemmings end up having a fight.

Beekeeping is not easy. Especially when you have Masha for an assistant! However, you should not be afraid of bees! / Autumn forest is so wonderful. You can pick mushrooms, listen to birds singing ... But what if there are absolutely no mushrooms at all? / Himalayan Bear is once again competing with Bear! This time they have arranged a bike race, but something doesnt smell right: Himalayan Bear intends on cheating to win! / What a great find in the forest! Masha has come across a real live hat! Is it worth saying how delighted the little mischievous girl is? / Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. / Yay, its Bears birthday! Well, it might be a "hooray" for someone and may not be for someone else: the only thing Bear himself dreams of is that the day will be a relaxing one.

Its a big day in Pontypandy Gareth is opening the Pontypandy mountain railway line and station. / When Bronwyn gives her father Gareth Griffiths a sausage sandwich for his lunch she has no idea the lengths Nipper the dog will go to for a bite! / Sarah makes up a story about a monster to get more customers on her Grandads railway. / Dilys tries her best to help her little treasure Norman get his Pontypandy pioneer fishing badge with disastrous results. / Trevor is driving his bus in the near by town of Newtown but he skids off the road and lands in a nearby lake Moose. / Norman Price causes havoc on Halloween when he tries to collect more sweets than the other children.

Grizzy finds a magicians hat that tosses out objects stored inside beforehand with the tap of a magic wand. / Grizzy wants to try out the brand new packaging format of chocolate spread that he discovers in the rangers cupboard a yummy-looking XXL jar. / A magic tomahawk divides Grizzy into two identical bears with diametrically opposite personalities one short-tempered the other super-sweet. / Grizzy imagines having a nice car to attract his crush. / While chasing the Lemmings Grizzy crashes into an arcade cabinet near the supermarket which displays a model fortuneteller and her crystal ball. / A newly unpacked UV tanning booth holds the place of honor in the middle of the cabin. / The Lemmings have turned the entire cabin topsy-turvy to organize medieval jousts with the rangers fencing gear. / A strange object is delivered to the Rangers cabin: an over-board!

Lu has trouble waiting for her turn to play with a toy. / Lu accidentally breaks Barnabys special twig and realises how much it means to him. / Biba gets frustrated when Lu abandons their cushion castle to play with baby Bo. / Gus demands Lu play by the rules. / Lu wants Biba to play only with her at Shell School today. / Lu cant understand why Gus is afraid of the vacuum cleaner. / Lu and Barnaby cant agree on how to play with a cardboard box.

The Wheels on the Bus and Other Melodies / London Bridge is falling own and Other Melodies / Everybody is blowing up their balloons and getting ready for the boat race! Who do you think will win? / Let’s all toss a ball and put it in a basket! What do you get? Basketball! Come join the fun!

During a community litter pick, the children chase after a seagull who’s stolen Lily’s toy, and end up in need of a helicopter rescue on the islands! / Norman Price gets Trevor Evans and Tom Thomas to have a competition to see whose food tastes better. Trevor Evans puts coal on to his barbecue causing some trees to catch fire. / It’s Sam’s birthday and Charlie has got Joe to make Sam a remote control model of Jupiter. Unfortunately Hannah and Sarah decide to play with it and accidentally break it! / Fireman Sam and the rest of the team are training Mike Flood and Charlie Jones to be reserve firemen and Station Officer Steele is very pleased with their progress. / When Charlie takes the kids on a sailing lesson, he feels upstaged by Peter and a seagull. As Charlie tries to win back the kids’ attention, he ends up sinking the boat.

Mr Bean is watering Mr Paliwal’s precious plant while he’s on holiday… what could possibly go wrong?! / When the bin men refuse to collect Mr Bean’s bin, he tries to trick them into taking it. / Everyone seems to be going on holiday apart from Mr Bean, so he decides to recreate one at home! / Mr Bean ties Teddy to a balloon he’s won at a funfair – but it floats off, taking Teddy with it!

Mr Bean ends up on stage at the opera house...in a dress! / Mr Bean becomes a taxi driver after being locked in a taxi. / Mr Bean tries to get some muscles but attempts a shortcut to physical perfection. / Mr Bean has a new friend - a Seagull but sometimes friends can overstay their welcome.

Mr Bean discovers the great outdoors is not always so great. / Mr Bean’s hobby goes down in flames in his battle for air supremacy. / During a visit to Buckingham Palace Mr Bean meets the lady of the house. / Mr Bean takes a trip down Memory Lane

Bean is unimpressed with Declans new SUV. / Mrs. Wicket ropes in Bean to look after her nephew. / Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming. / Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean stay in to take delivery of a new lounge chair.

Grundy, a giant monster truck, causes chaos as he stomps around Gotham and creates a mess. / When MOE creates a new, super sparkly vehicle paint, the Batwheels decide to put on a talent show to see who will get a shiny new makeover! / When the Legion of Zoom gains control of the Batcaves giant T-Rex, MOE creates a giant Bat-robot to stop the marauding dinosaur. / When the Legion of Zoom gains control of the Batcaves giant T-Rex, MOE creates a giant Bat-robot to stop the marauding dinosaur.

Masha plays fairy Godmother and brings everyone together for the Harvest Festival. / The Bear is struggling against a greedy moth in his house. Trying to save his magic box he puts it on the porch and Masha finds the magic hat that can make her invisible / Masha wants to play hide and seek. But the Bear has other plans in mind. Knowing that it is impossible to go against her wishes he agrees to play with her. / It is raining cats and dogs outside and the Bear is going to read a book. He is sure that Masha will stay home but she soon shows up on his doorstep and also wants to read. / Masha has the hiccups! The Bear tries remedies from a medical encyclopaedia to stop the hiccups. In the end they spread to the other forest inhabitants. / Masha finds a magical hat that grants gifts to all the forest dwellers. / The Bear is tired of being an eternal nanny for Masha and Panda who have ruined the entire house! He decides to get some rest and hires a special nanny for the little ‘angels’…

When Bronwyn gives her father Gareth Griffiths a sausage sandwich for his lunch she has no idea the lengths Nipper the dog will go to for a bite! / Sam and the crew arrive at Lizzie’s Vet Surgery to find that Woolly is stuck on the roof! / When the PA system blows out and sparks a fire at the Pontypandy Fun Run, it’s all hands-on deck to stop the spreading flames! / Sarah, James and Lily are out with their parents and Trevor is being guided along Pontypandy Mountain by Moose. / After exploring a sea cave by kayak, Jodie and Hannah realize the boat they arrived on has been pulled out to sea in a riptide. They’re stranded!

The Lemmings have set up a long line of dominos in the cabin that ends with several giant ice blocks and a rocket outside. / The Lemmings find an ice block outside the log cabin that holds a frozen prehistoric animal: a saber-toothed racoon. / By chance, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a container filled with metal survival food flasks. / In a trunk, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a big chocolate egg with a surprise inside. / The Lemmings open a nightclub. / The Lemmings come up with a ride worthy of a county fair in the living room. / Before an audience of penguins and walruses, two teams of Lemmings perform acrobatic high jumps, competing for the winning prize.

programmes.t: One More Game / Nature Chat / Missing Mel
programmes.d: Barney helps David see the value of balancing video games with physical play. / Barney shows Mel the importance of not just respecting nature, but also being a caretaker of it. / When Mel breaks her arm, she’s away from the park while she recovers and her friends do something nice to show her how much they missed her. / Mel makes a big mess in the park and learns its important to care for shared spaces.

Mr Bean breaks Mrs Wicket’s antique grandfather clock and has to get it repaired before she notices! / Mr Bean buys an expensive dress for Irma which he plans to return - so has to protect it from damage. / Mr Bean decides to stay in bed all day – even when making his breakfast, brushing his teeth and ordering a pizza! / Mr Paliwal has a new electric go-kart and challenges Mr Bean to a race – so he has to build one from scratch!

Mr Bean ends up on stage at the opera house...in a dress! / Mr Bean becomes a taxi driver after being locked in a taxi. / Mr Bean tries to get some muscles but attempts a shortcut to physical perfection. / Mr Bean has a new friend - a Seagull but sometimes friends can overstay their welcome.

Mr Bean discovers the great outdoors is not always so great. / Mr Bean’s hobby goes down in flames in his battle for air supremacy. / During a visit to Buckingham Palace Mr Bean meets the lady of the house. / Mr Bean takes a trip down Memory Lane

Bean is unimpressed with Declans new SUV. / Mrs. Wicket ropes in Bean to look after her nephew. / Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming. / Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean stay in to take delivery of a new lounge chair.

Its Malcolms first day in Pontypandy, but Bronwyns welcome party nibbles turn out a bit too fiery for everyones tastes. / Station Officer Steele gets dancing lessons from the firefighters so that he could go to the Firefighters Gala. / A made-up traffic report creates a real traffic problem, so when an emergency call comes, the Fire Team and Police Horse Kilo must go cross-country! / On Fireman Sams day off the crew are inundated with the Jones emergencies. Firefighter Penny Morris has caught a cold but she still tries to perform her firefighter duties. / Norman Mandy Sarah and James are participating in Moose’s Wild West Experience. Sam and Penny rescue Mandy and her horse after they fall down a slope and get tangled in bushes.

Gus gets upset when he cant finish his rocket the way hed planned. / Lu has difficulty letting go of her favourite but now-too-small rain boots. / Lu isnt as good at catching as she thought she was. / Declan is frustrated when Lu has the same favourite thing as him. / Biba gets upset when her clay star goes missing during tidy up time. / Lu and Biba accidentally rig their treasure hunt game.

Bear needs to step away for a while, leaving Masha, Panda, and Penguin alone at home. It seems to be a simple situation - something all adults can understand. / Who is the best cook in all the forest? Masha has no doubts as to how to correctly answer this question. And the proof is right before you: macaroni cooked by Masha herself. / Ah, love, love! Bear prepares a gift for the Lady Bear and, as usual, dreams of winning his ladys heart. But Masha is also here! / Wow, its another New Year! Masha has a lot of experience in organizing unforgettable celebrations, so she takes matters into her own hands this time, too. / Wow, thats really something! Masha saves Bear from a fire! And a grateful Bear makes her a gift - a toy fire truck. / Bear has a new problem: his garden has been overtaken by dandelions!

Charlie takes the schoolchildren on a fishing trip and catches the biggest shoal of fish ever. / Station Officer Steele discovers his old fire engine Bessie which turns out to be useful in a railway emergency. / When Norman and Derek see a video of a champ snowboarder they decide to try snowboarding with an ironing table. / Tom and Moose take the Pontypandy Pioneers on a mountain climbing expedition. / Norman spoils everyones trip to the lighthouse by locking them all out on the balcony in a bid to avoid cleaning Mikes muddy van which he ruined.

Grizzy and the Lemmings discover the joys of photography with the rangers instant print camera. / The fridge in the cabin gets replaced by a new appliance. / Grizzy watches a demonstration of balloon modelling on TV. He decides to make a balloon poodle to offer the she-bear hes enamored with. / Grizzy needs a nice nap. He cant find a pillow comfortable enough to his taste until he tests the pillow that the Lemmings use as a high-jump mat. / Grizzy is awakened from his nap by the unpleasant ongoing sound of Velcro strips being ripped off. / The she-bear Grizzy is enamored with has lost her favorite flower in an inaccessible spot under a giant boulder. Grizzy tries to lift it: impossible! / The Lemmings try to catch a bat to play rodeo disturbing Grizzy as he plays his favorite game on the rangers mobile. / The Lemmings have a blast testing every app on the rangers tablet one by one. A van with Monkeys arrived at the Bears house. But a pigeon settles in the birdhouse near Bear’s house, and Masha, obviously, is more than happy to lure him and caress him. / Bear has made a new purchase: he decided to buy a motorcycle! Christmas is coming and there is to be a competition for the best Christmas lights in Pontypandy. / Mandy offers to babysit Lily when Helen Flood invites Mrs Chen and Penny over for a girls night in but things take a dangerous turn when some curling tongs start a fire. / Charlie is so busy correcting Gareths haphazard preparations for the firework display that he misses a Catherine wheel nailed too tightly to the door of Bessies shed. / When Tom and Moose volunteer to help Mandy and Norman spot a fox the animal scampers off with Mooses hat and Tom and Moose end up stuck in a fox hole. / Everyone goes to the beach for a picnic but Lily needs help when she gets stranded on a sandbank. / Mrs Chens class make sky lanterns for Chinese New Year but until Norman Price creates a disaster when he lets go of his too early.

Grizzy and the Lemmings discover the rangers latest acquisition: a 3D printer that will duplicate anything at all in miniature form. / Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a strange gateway to a parallel world. Biba gets a birthday present that Lu herself really wants. / Declan learns there are some things we just don’t know the answer to-and that’s OK / Lu learns that she can’t be upset with someone for doing something she has also done / Lu learns to be aware of and include others need for choice / Lu learns to commit to a decision / Declan causes a stir when he decides not to say please. / Elodie upsets Lu when she forgets her promise to push her on the swing.

Fareed Zakaria brings viewers his insights and analysis, and interviews world leaders, artists, scientists, business leaders, global affairs analysts and other cultural observers for the Global Public Square.

Larry Madowo sits down with Grammy-winning singer Tems in Lagos to trace her journey from bedroom producer to global icon. She opens up about her creative process, meteoric rise, and her mission to empower women through her Leading Vibe Initiative, offering an intimate look at an artist reshaping global music on her own terms.

The Middle East is undergoing a healthcare revolution, with cutting-edge medical technology, increased investment, and world-class facilities transforming the sector. At the forefront of this change is Sir Magdi Yacoub, the renowned British-Egyptian heart surgeon whose groundbreaking work has saved countless lives. Now, hes bringing his expertise home with the launch of a state-of-the-art hospital in Cairo, set to become a regional center of excellence in cardiac care and research. We explore Yacoubs legacy his vision for the future of healthcare in the region. Also: in this Abu Dhabi operation theatre room, the lead surgeon, Dr. Usman Ahmad, has multiple robot arms as he conducts surgery. As the first hospital in the Gulf to successfully perform robotic lung transplants, Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi is at the forefront of the region, presenting a strong case for utilizing robotics in the treatment of complex thoracic conditions. We explore the importance of robotic-assisted surgery for high-risk patients and how this will transform transplant care in the wider region.

As tourist numbers continue to rise worldwide, African wildlife parks are facing unprecedented challenges. In Kenyas iconic Masai Mara Reserve, the home of the Great Migration and one of the natural wonders of the world, the number of wildebeest migrating has dropped as tourist numbers have gone up. We take a look at the delicate balancing act required to ensure the preservation of the migration with evergrowing travel demands. Also: ranked one of Africas growing companies by the Financial Times in 2024, Hubtel originally began two decades ago as a messaging company in Ghana. Since then, its turned into an e-payments and commerce behemoth with 23 offices across Ghana. We spoke to CEO Alex Bram about the companys pivot towards fintech, growth strategy, and the importance of staying purely self funded within Ghana.
Richard celebrates a personal milestone - his 100th country visited - by embarking on an extraordinary journey through Omans rich culture and striking landscapes.

Across music, dance and comedy, a new wave of Ugandan performers is captivating audiences, all while championing a vibrant creative culture at home. We spotlight three standout talents : Afro-soul musician Joshua Baraka, international Latin dance maestro Valentino R. Kabenge, and comedy superstar Kansiime Anne, exploring how venues like the Uganda National Cultural Centre are nurturing the next generation of Ugandan performers.

Lieutenant Joe Kenda and his Colorado Springs crime-fighting team have solved an unprecedented 387 homicide investigations, resulting in a 92 percent solve rate. Each episode of Homicide Hunter will use Kendas first person narrative along with dramatic re-creations to retell the stories of Kendas most disturbing and challenging murder cases. Homicide Hunters takes viewers behind the scenes with one of the worlds best homicide detectives to learn how murders are solved. A group of friends discover the corpse of small time entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket, with two gunshots to the stomach and one to the head. With scant physical evidence except for a missing safe, Lt. Joe Kenda turns his attention to the victims friends and associates only to discover that Jamie Fosters lucrative business dealings put him in close quarters with a multitude of unsavoury characters. In an attempt to narrow the field, Kenda must uncover the contents of the missing safe, and track down a suspect whose greed led to bloodshed.

In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

With first-hand testimony from family members, police officers, witnesses and reporters, we shine a light on some of Britains darkest murder locations, examining the crimes that rocked these communities.

Every 90 seconds, someone is reported missing. Powerful testimonies are shared from families and friends of those who have disappeared, whilst revealing the forensically detailed process of the police and authorities that investigate and convict.

The murder of Cari Farver unfolded amidst a complex web of jealousy and obsession in her relationships with David Kroupa and Shanna "Liz" Golyar. Cari mysteriously vanished after leaving Davids apartment, triggering suspicious text messages.

Stories of ordinary people who come to a fatal end because of jealousy. Each episode delves into the true-life happenings and misfortunes of the victims, many of whom suffered life-changing experiences as a result.
From grieving family and friends to jilted lovers, investigators pore over every detail and discrepancy to uncover motives for murder, along with the reason for suppressing key pieces of evidence.

Two young mothers are found gunned down in their car, parked behind a crowded dive bar, and its up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine which one was the intended target and which one was collateral damage. But the case takes a bizarre turn when he learns of another young woman who was murdered just four days earlier, under eerily similar circumstances. In search for a connecting thread between all three victims, Kenda interviews an informant who warns of a rumoured hit list, written by the criminal underworlds most deadly players, which may be behind all three homicides.

Doofenshmirtz s kraftsugarinator aktiveras av misstag och studsar via Phineas och Ferbs rymdstation. Strålen traffar den brottsbekampande kvartetten Spider Man, Hulk, Iron Man och Thor, som på kuppen blir av med sina superkrafter. Phineas, Ferb och ganget ar beredda att hjalpa dem att återfå sina krafter, så att de kan fortsatta att bekampa sina fiender, men Candace lagger nasan i blot och nånting går snett.

Love Handels song "The Ballad of Klimpaloon" is nominated for "Best Fact-Based Song" at the Tristies, the tri-state areas music award show sponsored by Random Swimwear. But when the existence of the magical, human-like bathing suit Klimpaloon is questioned, Phineas, Ferb and the gang must travel to the Himalayas to prove his existence and validate Love Handels nomination. Guest starring is Jon Stewart as Mr. Random, President of Random Swimwear.
On New Years Eve, the Greens and Gloria attempt to set their resolutions. Cricket and Remy challenge Vasquez to a snowball fight, while Tilly creates a snowperson.
The kids play a role-playing game at Remys but his rules lead to conflict. The Greens go out for karaoke, but Tilly struggles to express her true self through song.

Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best buddy Remy.
Kiff runs for class president against a surprise candidate, Mr. RiPeppa. The Chatterleys take Barry on their island vacation, but he seems to have a dark secret.
Kiff and Barry try to stay awake until 4am to see a very special comet. Kiff meets a bad banana.
Cricket loses his hearing and keeps it a secret from Bill. The Greens go to a hipster drive-in movie, where Gloria proves her life is fun by taking the perfect Snap-A-Gram photo.
Remy is determined to be a martial arts warrior after freezing in the face of danger. Cricket’s missing dirt jar prompts the story of when the Greens left their country farm.
The Greens leave Big City and move back to their country farm, but grow unsettled when things arent quite how they remember.

Det har gått tio år och Phineas och Ferb ska borja på college om några veckor, men Phineas har inte bestamt var han ska gå. Isabella ska åka till sitt college om några timmar och ganget pratar om att de alltid har trott att Phineas och Isabella skulle bli ett par, så de gor allt de kan for att fora dem samman, innan de åker till sina skolor.spelar ett dataspel. Under tiden håller doktor Doofenshmirtz en forelasning om motivation.

programmes.d: Ladybug and her team face an imaginative villain.
When Lizards potion turns the villains into dinosaurs, the Spidey team and White Tiger help capture them. Doc Ocks bug sneaks into WEB-Quarters and turns WEB-STER evil.
Goofy’s feelings are hurt when his new pal, Kyle, doesn’t want to give him a hug. When Funny isn’t around, it’s up to Mickey and friends to have a fun day on their own.
Its Mickeys birthday and his pals want to make his birthday wish come true. Kyung Won is having trouble when everyone pays attention to his sister, Ae-Che, on her first birthday!
When the gang notices that Teddy is acting differently, they bring him in for a checkup. Goofy finds Care-abelles lost magic grow tool, and things start growing out of control!
A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

Calypso mediates as Bluey and friends accuse Rusty of ruining their game. They were playing a simple game of baby hospital. When Indy’s baby came early (just like her little sister), it needed special care and attention, requiring her mother Indy to be very brave. But Rusty ruined everything by picking the early baby up! Rusty apologies, explaining that he was playing a game of Knights and he was just trying to rescue the kings daughter, kidnapped by a ravenous dragon. As he explains the bravery of the king’s daughter, Bluey and her friends recognise how much their games have in common.
When Indy and Rusty play Mum and Dads, they can’t agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby!

Bluey loves playing hide and seek, but the family are convinced she will get distracted and forget to find them. Bluey promises to stay focused and, after a count to twenty, the game is on! But her promise quickly comes undone when she uncovers Chattermax (a noisy old toy) hidden under the sink. Bluey is distracted and forgets their game, leaving her frustrated family stuck hiding. It’s only when she rediscovers how noisy and annoying Chattermax can be, and needs help shutting it off, that Bluey at last harnesses her ability to focus, remembers the abandoned game and finds everyone at last.
While on a camping holiday, Bluey makes a new friend called Jean-Luc. Bluey may not understand him, but they find a common language playing and hunting for a wild Daddy pig.

When Mum and Dad collapse on the couch after a busy day, they give Bluey and Bingo five minutes until bed, just enough time to race to the summit of Mt MumandDad! Bluey hurries ahead, too impatient to wait for Bingo as she packs her camping supplies, leading to accusations of cheating. All their bickering wakes the rumbling mountain and an avalanche of pillows and tickles sends them scurrying for shelter in Bingo’s tent. Waiting for the storm to pass, Bingo breaks out her supplies and Bluey apologises for cheating. When the storm passes, they make for the summit and plant their flag together.

During a quick trip to the shops Bluey, Bingo and Dad play a game of ‘Kids’, where Bluey plays Mum, Bingo is her cute baby, Snowdrop, and Dad is her sulky son, Diddums. Not only does Bluey hamper Dad’s efforts to buy groceries, by buying nothing but junk food, but she also prefers the secretly naughty Snowdrop over Dad and even embarrasses him in front of his friends. When Dad rebels and shows how much of a handful he can really be, Bluey puts her foot down and declares that Snowdrop is her favourite child. Diddums is devastated and Bluey finally recognises why Dads don’t pick favourites.
During the holiday time of Wassailia, Sofia helps Chrysta with last minute Protector missions in the Mystic Isles to help her get home in time to celebrate with her family.
Sofia searches for an animal helper to assist her with a school presentation.
When Fuli over-extends herself, she learns the importance of working together as a team.
It is time! Join Kion, second born cub of Simba and Nala, as he becomes the leader of the Lion Guard and assembles a team to help him keep the circle of life intact.

At school, Bluey and her friends throw themselves into various games. Strolling the room, teacher Calypso gently nudges the kids into each other’s orbit, and soon make-believe mother Indy is moving into Rusty’s new house while waitressing at Bluey’s fish and chip shop! Everything’s going like clockwork, until an extra-large delivery causes Indy to almost step on Honey’s gnome village! Thankfully, Calypso is ten steps ahead, dispatching the Terriers to defend the village and save the day. Balance is restored. Only Pretzel remains, but his new game of catching fish gives Calypso an idea.
When its Bingos turn to bring her Kindys Bob Bilby puppet home and record their weekend in the scrapbook, the family resolve to put down their screens and show him a good time.
When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Blueys game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand, until they realise they can play it their own way.
When Indy and Rusty play Mum and Dads, they can’t agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby!
Indy thinks shes no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.
Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still cant beat Dad.
After Zola steals the Community Center’s party, the community works together to get it back. Team Spidey has to figure out where Sandman is hiding a migration of butterflies.

Nar dom delar på sig måste Gecko hantera sina misstag sjalv for att kunna besegra Nattninjan. Romeo skapar ett verkligt TV-spel och Pyjamashjaltarna måste samarbeta med skurkarna for att kunna stoppa honom.
At night normal kids Connor, Greg and Amaya don their pyjamas, activate their bracelets and gain super powers, becoming superheroes Catboy, Gekko and Owlette, ready to fight evil.
Doorknob helps Rosa attend Hattie and the Queens tea parties at once. When Alice hosts a Favorite Things party, the March Hare leaves her guessing what his favorite treat is.
On Hanukkah, Hattie gets a hat-bachi grill. Alice makes too much snow, and must find a way to warm up Wonderland.
Hattie worries that Dad Hatter and March Hares hat designs are too bonkers for the royal family. Alice hears the tune of a Forget-Me-Now flower and forgets all her recipes.
When Lizards potions turn him giant, he tries to take over Stark Tower and faces giant-sized Spidey. Rhino gets ahold of White Tigers gem and causes animal trouble in the city.
The Spidey bots help Team Spidey defeat Doc Ocks plans to launch a rocket. The villains steal Black Panthers super battery and cause trouble in the city.
King Ludwig brings a new troubadour to the royal court, and the Royal Troubadour worries hell be forgotten. Minnie is sad when she doesnt get a cool pod mod to test.
Lost N Found Island folks cant find their coquí friend, Lukey, to thank him for singing. Pinky shows the gang her favorite tree, but a hive of bees wants the tree to make honey.
The gang needs Crystal Clearwaters help when discovering the Weasels have brought an invasive species. Trolland goes on an epic adventure to be King Ludwigs heroic knight!
Its bedtime, and Bingo cant remember where she left her beloved Floppy. Retracing their steps, Bingo and Bluey lead their Mum through their day in the hope of finding Floppy

Bluey builds herself the perfect make-believe playhouse out of the couch cushions and is delighted when Bingo, Mum and Dad all build their own houses next door! Their new neighbourhood is fantastic, until Bingo takes over Bluey’s reading nook with her growing menagerie of farm animals! Unsure how to resolve the situation amicably, Bluey reaches out to Mum (who’s having issues of her own dealing with a constantly noisy Dad). When Mum demonstrates the power of being firm yet polite with Dad, Bluey is able to find a compromise with Bingo that restores peace to their tiny neighbourhood.

At bedtime Bluey and Bingo are teasing each other. When Mum tells them to stop, they complain that Dad is always teasing them and a heated debate ensues. One by one, Bluey and Bingo recall all the times that Dad has teased them, like when he plays Password or Name Change or when he pretends to be Mum. The girls convince Mum that Dad is a “Big Teaser”, but Dad tells them that teasing is simply a fun way to test their limits. The girls realise that they can give as good as they get and in the end both Dad and the girls finally understand and agree on the difference between teasing and playing.
Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - theyre not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyones got a wild side.

Bluey and Bingo’s desire for a pet is tested, when Dad transforms his hand into the chaotic Emu, Shaun. As Shaun turns the house upside down, ignoring their commands, Mum advises Bluey to remain ‘calm and controlled’. So, when an unruly Shaun escapes the lead on a walk and runs for the prickle bushes, Bluey summons her inner-mum and stops the bird in its tracks with a calm command. Now that Bluey has got the upper hand, Dad is run ragged, as Shaun must do everything they say at the park. A tired Dad bids Shaun farewell… just in time for the girls to introduce four baby emus Shaun left behind!
When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained.

Its Christmas Eve and Dad and the kids are taking turns pretending to be Santa! But when Socks nips Bluey and Bluey refuses to leave her a present, they must all learn the true meaning of being good for Christmas.
Sofias amulet summons her to rescue a princess in need who turns out to be her former foe, Princess Ivy.
When Amber, Sofia and Miranda take a sailing trip to see a Meteor Shower, they end up being kidnapped by pirates.
It is time! Join Kion, second born cub of Simba and Nala, as he becomes the leader of the Lion Guard and assembles a team to help him keep the circle of life intact.
Bluey and her friends turn a tree stump into a thrilling game of Helicopter. But as the pilot, Bluey has to learn to give up some control, so they can all have fun.
Bluey, Snickers and Winton are on their way to ask Calypso for help with their problems, when they are ambushed by the Terriers and use their unique talents to get past.

Bluey and Chloe turn the playground into a magical kingdom where a princess is tasked by the Kindly Queen to find food and save her people. Taking turns playing all the lead roles, the two friends journey into a world where they encounter rude terriers, grandma fairies and brave the machinations of the Greedy Queen who has frozen all her enemies! Finally finding her courage, the princess tricks the queen with a well thrown tennis ball and captures her magic wand––unfreezing the people of the kingdom and saving the day!

Finding themselves stranded in a palm tree shadow-island when Mum calls them back for tea and cupcakes, Coco is ready to break the rules and step out of the shade.
